CONTENT.Career: Farías joined Palestino in 2015 and ended his contract with them in December 2023. He also had a stint on loan with Cypriot club APOEL, with whom he took part in the 2017–18 UEFA Champions League.
CONTENT.Honours: Nueva ChicagoPrimera B Metropolitana (1): 2013–14APOELCypriot First Division (1): 2017–18PalestinoCopa Chile (1): 2018
CONTENT.Personal life: He acquired the Chilean nationality by permanent residency, after receiving his naturalization certificate on March 3, 2021.
CONTENT.External links: Agustín Farías at BDFA (in Spanish)Agustín Farías at Soccerway

SUMMARY: Carlos Agustín Farías (born December 25, 1987, in Buenos Aires, Argentina), known as Agustín Farías, is an Argentine-born Chilean footballer that currently plays for Chilean club Universidad Católica as a midfielder.
